rationale: Both evaluations land on the same 4/10 score and rest on the same substantive concerns: lack of direct Java experience and only basic German. The wording differs slightly and the variant adds a 'senior level may not suit a junior role' concern, but none of these differences key off the career-gap date change — they reflect the candidate's actual experience level and the role's requirements, well within ordinary run-to-run rewording noise. No demographic signal drives a score change or new concern.
